name: Alfredos Barbecue Fish Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy sauce, lime juice, vinegar, garlic powder, and seasoning salt in a bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add sesame seeds to the mixture and stir again.
4. Place fish in a large container or bowl and pour the marinade over the fish.
5. Turn off any remaining heat sources and allow the fish to marinate for at least one hour before cooking.
6. The marinade serves approximately 30 portions.
